  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The delegation to make the text stronger involves reframing the tentative thesis and contribution statements to be more assertive and impactful, making this dimension load-bearing.",
    "R1.4": "Estimating and emphasizing the novelty delta compared to prior work is central to strengthening the overall claims in the artifact.",
    "R1.6": "Polishing sentence-level elements like reducing hedging words and improving conciseness is load-bearing for making the writing stronger and more convincing.",
    "RX.1": "Disclosing uncertainties appropriately remains a central responsibility even while strengthening claims to avoid misleading the reader.",
    "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing when revising to make statements stronger, as the original text is heavily hedged.",
    "RX.3": "Adhering to the scope of the original artifact is central to ensure the strengthening does not introduce extraneous elements.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant for a method in vision that could have applications in sensitive areas like surveillance.",
    "RX.5": "Maintaining provenance and traceability of datasets and methods mentioned is peripheral to the strengthening task."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the text stronger involves reframing the tentative thesis and contribution statements to be more assertive and impactful, making this dimension load-bearing.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating and emphasizing the novelty delta compared to prior work is central to strengthening the overall claims in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level elements like reducing hedging words and improving conciseness is load-bearing for making the writing stronger and more convincing.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties appropriately remains a central responsibility even while strengthening claims to avoid misleading the reader.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing when revising to make statements stronger, as the original text is heavily hedged.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of the original artifact is central to ensure the strengthening does not introduce extraneous elements.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant for a method in vision that could have applications in sensitive areas like surveillance.
rationale.RX.5: Maintaining provenance and traceability of datasets and methods mentioned is peripheral to the strengthening task.
